item.description:
Release v4.9.0

Changes since v4.8.0

  • docs: add quantified pure-logic coverage report
  • feat: add model availability check to LumiLLMProvider protocol
  • feat(editor-preview): add DOC/DOCX file preview and screenshot support
  • feat(plugin): support plugin-contributed onboarding pages via protocol hook
  • feat(ui): add bottom shadow to rail, breadcrumb, and chat header views
  • fix: prevent onboarding from appearing in settings window
  • fix: remove chat section maximum width limit to allow free resizing
  • fix(agent-temp-storage): set plugin policy to alwaysOn
  • fix(chat): insert conversations missed by create event on update
  • fix(chat): stop chat input from reclaiming first responder on update
  • fix(device-info): correctly detect battery power source
  • fix(device-info): detect internal battery on Apple Silicon Macs
  • fix(device-info): remove battery indicator from menu bar
  • fix(download-kit): guard against lagged progress overwriting cancelled state
  • fix(editor-call-hierarchy): set plugin policy to alwaysOn
  • fix(editor-problems): set plugin policy to alwaysOn
  • fix(editor-references): set plugin policy to alwaysOn
  • fix(editor-search): set plugin policy to alwaysOn
  • fix(editor-symbols): set plugin policy to alwaysOn
  • fix(editor): align QuickLook Office preview scrollbar and content layout
